mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month rise in the unemployment rate above 5% signals deteriorating labor market conditions, reducing corporate profit expectations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of instances where UNRATE exceeds 5.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in real estate finance and housing starts signals strong consumer demand, driving corporate revenue growth and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.05 for any 3-year window, or 60-day returns in high RSAFS/HOUST periods are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in industrial production below its 12-month moving average signals weakening supply chain capacity, reducing corporate earnings and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where INDPRO falls below its 12mo MA.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month CPI inflation rate above 2.5% signals central bank tightening pressure, increasing equity discount rates and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 2.5%.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in nonfarm payrolls above 100k per month signals strong labor market demand, boosting consumer spending and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day returns in high PAYEMS periods are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in GDP and housing starts signals robust aggregate demand, driving corporate revenue growth and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.05 for any 3-year window, or 60-day returns in high GDPC1/HOUST periods are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month rise in the federal funds rate above 4% signals monetary tightening, increasing borrowing costs and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where FEDFUNDS exceeds 4.0%.
